author: Jordan
content: Day 12 post-op. Finally walked without crutches today. Small win.

author: Maya
content: Rehab felt heavy today, but I still showed up. Proud of that.

author: Sam
content: Quick progress clip today. Not perfect, but better than last week.

author: Ava
content: Progress isn’t linear. Keep going even when it’s quiet.

author: Chris
content: Confidence is coming back. I’m trusting my body again.

author: Justin
content: Reminder: showing up counts even when the session feels rough.

author: Riley
content: Today I focused on breathing before rehab. It helped more than I expected.

author: Tavion
content: Small wins add up. Stack the days and protect your mindset.

author: Maya
content: Told myself: I don’t need to be perfect, I just need to be consistent.

author: Sam
content: One thing that helped today: I stopped comparing my timeline to anyone else.
